Alright everybody, the client has now come in for their next check-in. Been around for about a month now and this is now the second half coming up of the dedicated fat loss phase and so we want to make sure that they're sticking to their ultimate package of supplements to make sure you establish that keystone habit that they have to base their habits around. By now they have some idea of how to prepare food okay because again they start of a just a food list don't stuff don't starve see you know let them wander a little bit see what they come up with. The next step was alright we're gonna give you specific amounts of food to consume where on the back end we have an idea of what how many calories that we want them to consume but they're gonna eyeball so it's gonna be up and down but it's all good it's still gonna be less than what they were consuming before and they're continuing to weigh themselves every day so at this point you've now they've put themselves into a deficit by eating healthy and weighing themselves every day and you went and further increase that deficit by giving them specific amounts of meals with eyeballed portions based off the hand method and now the next iteration of this plan is gonna increase the amount of accuracy of their tracking a little bit and that is to go from eyeballing right using the hand method to tracking food mass and when I say that I mean instead of taking a palm of protein they're now going to be measuring four ounces or 112 grams okay depending on where you live I'm I prefer things like grams because they're more accurate but basically you're gonna go from looking at stuff to weighing it and then this transition is actually massive because everybody always over estimates or underestimates rather their their intake and so this puts them into a steeper deficit without having to change the food prescription so basically if a person is on a 1500 calorie plan or whatever the previous check-in but they were eyeballing they were eating more than that okay and so by incorporating from mass going from eyeballs to weighing and then tracking into my fitness pal the person now has a couple of things one you've increased the deficit by virtue of increasing their precision which is very important especially for later on but it also gets them a little more aware of the concept of protein carbohydrate and fat and the distribution which comes important later on so just to make sure making sure they're staying on the supplement measurement now we are moving on from eyeballing and hand measurements to physical mass okay using a food scale if you want you can use things like you know cups and tea at tablespoons and things like that I'm always going to lead towards using a scale because it is more accurate okay and they're going to be taking these food masses and logging them into a calorie tracker like my fitness pal they still have the exact same amount of calories prescribed the difference is that they are now weighing them instead of eyeballing and they are now taking that information and transcribing it into a calorie tracking platform like my fitness pal which will then help us increase the amount of freedom they have with their food choice later on so hope that makes sense I'm going to be talking about the next step very soon
